texto: So, I created these creatures called The Frightened Ones which in the film you see do have mask like kind of heads and they run beneath the ground to hide. Which is what in fact we did during the war.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gerald Scarfe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “So, I created these creatures called The Frightened Ones which in the film you see do have mask l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mask, you pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de you e see.
